description_long: This is a small, rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof covered in dark shingles. The front facade features a centered wooden door flanked by two small stone steps and a circular window above the entrance. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, giving it a traditional log cabin appearance. The rear side has a single rectangular window, while the sides are mostly solid with the roof slightly overhanging. The roof is steeply pitched and extends beyond the walls, providing some shelter at the front and back. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for residential or park settings.
description: A compact wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, centered front door, and rustic log construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the centered wooden door, circular window above, and stone steps.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the overhanging gable roof and solid wooden wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a single rectangular window and the wooden plank exterior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the overhanging roof and no visible openings.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch and overhanging eaves, covered in dark shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: One small circular window centered above the front door and one rectangular window centered on the rear facade; windows are symmetrically placed and modest in size
attribute_door_placement: Single wooden door centered on the front facade, directly below the circular window
